creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 181416
Patch

6.0.13 - 2017-04-03
Fixed

    Fixed #2638: Regression in PHPUnit\Framework\TestCase:registerMockObjectsFromTestArguments()

6.0.12 - 2017-04-02
Fixed

    Fixed #2145: --stop-on-failure fails to stop on PHP 7
    Fixed #2448: Weird error when trying to run Test from Test.php but Test.php does not exist
    Fixed #2572: PHPUnit\Framework\TestCase:.registerMockObjectsFromTestArguments() does not correctly handle arrays that reference themselves

Make test is fine.

Poudriere build fine for:

10.3 amd + i386
11.0 amd + i386
12-current amd + i386 (r314826)

portlint is also fine.

Cheers
jochen
